# CPI Email Signature Templates
## Community Partners International — Compliant Email Signatures

---

## HOW TO USE

1. Copy the HTML signature into your email client's signature settings
2. Replace `[Full Name]`, `[Job Title]`, `[Mobile]`, `[Email]`
3. No logo image is used — signatures are text-only with styled HTML links
4. Test by sending yourself a test email

---

## TEMPLATE 1 — CPI Bangladesh Staff (@cpintl.org domain)

Applies to all staff with email addresses ending in `@cpintl.org`.

### HTML Version:
```html
<div style="font-family: Arial, 'sans-serif'; line-height: 1.5em; font-size: 13px; max-width: 620px">
  <p style="color:#333333;">
    <strong style="color: #cc3366; text-decoration: none">[Full Name]</strong><br>
    [Job Title]<br>
    <strong>Community Partners International (CPI)</strong><br>
    Cell: +880 (0)[number]<br>
    <a href="https://cpintl.org" style="color: #cc3366; text-decoration: underline">Website</a> |
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/community-partners-international" style="color: #cc3366; text-decoration: underline">LinkedIn</a> |
    <a href="http://facebook.com/communitypartnersinternational" style="color: #cc3366; text-decoration: underline">Facebook</a>
  </p>
</div>
```

### Plain Text Version:
```
[Full Name]
[Job Title]
Community Partners International (CPI)

Cell: +880 (0)[number]
Website: cpintl.org | LinkedIn | Facebook
```

---

## TEMPLATE 2 — CPI-YPSA Joint Staff (@cpi-ypsa.org domain)

Applies to all staff with email addresses ending in `@cpi-ypsa.org`.

### HTML Version:
```html
<div style="font-family: Arial, 'sans-serif'; line-height: 1.5em; font-size: 13px; max-width: 620px;">
  <p style="color:#333333;">
    <strong style="color: #333333; text-decoration: none">[Full Name]</strong><br>
    [Job Title]<br>
    <strong>YPSA-CPI Rohingya Response Project</strong><br>
    Cell: +88 (0)[number]<br>
    <a href="https://ypsa.org/" style="color: #3366CC; text-decoration: underline">YPSA Website</a> |
    <a href="https://cpintl.org/" style="color: #3366CC; text-decoration: underline">CPI Website</a>
  </p>
</div>
```

### Plain Text Version:
```
[Full Name]
[Job Title]
YPSA-CPI Rohingya Response Project

Cell: +88 (0)[number]
YPSA Website: ypsa.org | CPI Website: cpintl.org
```

---

## TEMPLATE 3 — Health Program Manager (Mohammad Ariful Islam)

### HTML Version (@cpintl.org):
```html
<div style="font-family: Arial, 'sans-serif'; line-height: 1.5em; font-size: 13px; max-width: 620px">
  <p style="color:#333333;">
    <strong style="color: #cc3366; text-decoration: none">Md. Ariful Islam</strong><br>
    Health Program Manager<br>
    <strong>Community Partners International (CPI)</strong><br>
    Cell: +880 (0)1723 889 843<br>
    <a href="https://cpintl.org" style="color: #cc3366; text-decoration: underline">Website</a> |
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/community-partners-international" style="color: #cc3366; text-decoration: underline">LinkedIn</a> |
    <a href="http://facebook.com/communitypartnersinternational" style="color: #cc3366; text-decoration: underline">Facebook</a>
  </p>
</div>
```

### HTML Version (@cpi-ypsa.org):
```html
<div style="font-family: Arial, 'sans-serif'; line-height: 1.5em; font-size: 13px; max-width: 620px;">
  <p style="color:#333333;">
    <strong style="color: #333333; text-decoration: none">Mohammad Ariful Islam</strong><br>
    Health Program Manager<br>
    <strong>YPSA-CPI Rohingya Response Project</strong><br>
    Cell: +88 (0)1723 889 843<br>
    <a href="https://ypsa.org/" style="color: #3366CC; text-decoration: underline">YPSA Website</a> |
    <a href="https://cpintl.org/" style="color: #3366CC; text-decoration: underline">CPI Website</a>
  </p>
</div>
```

### Plain Text Version:
```
Mohammad Ariful Islam
Health Program Manager
Community Partners International (CPI)

Cell: +880 (0)1723 889 843
cpintl.org | LinkedIn | Facebook
```

---

## EMAIL SIGNATURE RULES

| Element | Rule |
|---------|------|
| Font | Arial (system font for email compatibility) |
| Name (@cpintl.org) | Arial Bold, CPI Pink `#cc3366`, 13px |
| Name (@cpi-ypsa.org) | Arial Bold, Dark `#333333`, 13px |
| Organization | Arial Bold, `#333333` |
| Cell phone format | +880 (0)[number] or +88 (0)[number] |
| Links (@cpintl.org) | CPI Pink `#cc3366`, underlined |
| Links (@cpi-ypsa.org) | Blue `#3366CC`, underlined |
| Max width | 620px |
| Background | Transparent (no colored backgrounds) |
| Logo | Not included in text signatures |
